200.description: Return a list of non-expired sessions of the user.

get.description: Retrieve all non-expired sessions for the user, including session metadata and interaction details when available.

parameters.name: appType
parameters.description: Application type filter. Use 'thirdParty' to list third-party app grants only, or 'firstParty' to list first-party app grants only. If omitted, grants from all applications are returned.

200.description: Return non-expired grants of the user. Results are filtered by app type when `appType` is provided.

get.description: Retrieve all non-expired grants of the user. Optionally filter by application type via `appType`; when omitted, grants from all application types are returned.

200.description: Return a non-expired session of the user.

get.description: Retrieve a non-expired session for the user by session ID, including session metadata and interaction details when available.

parameters.name: revokeGrantsTarget
parameters.description: Optional target for revoking associated grants and tokens. 'all' revokes grants for every application authorized by this session. 'firstParty' revokes only first-party app grants; third-party app grants remain active. If omitted, grants remain active when the session authorizations include offline_access; otherwise they are revoked.

delete.description: Revoke a specific user session by its ID, optionally revoking associated target grants and tokens.
